name: mynode
postCreateCommand:
sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y sqlite3 libsqlite3-dev && sudo npm install -g @fission-ai/openspec && npm install && mkdir -p "$HOME/.config/openspec" && printf '%s
' '{"featureFlags":{},"profile":"custom","delivery":"both","workflows":["propose","explore","new","continue","apply","ff","sync","archive","bulk-archive","verify","onboard"]}' > "$HOME/.config/openspec/config.json" && cd /workspaces/mynode/myproject && openspec update . && cd /workspaces/mynode && mkdir -p .github && rm -rf .github/prompts .github/skills && cp -r myproject/.github/prompts .github/ && cp -r myproject/.github/skills .github/
